metadata.name: Cognitive Services Project
metadata.description:
This module deploys a Project within a Cognitive Services account.
It allows for the creation of a Foundry Project with optional managed identities and role assignments.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
The connection properties when the auth type is AAD.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
Required. The credentials for the connection.
The connection properties when the auth type is AccessKey.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
Required. The credentials for the connection.
The connection properties when the auth type is AccountKey.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
Required. The credentials for the connection.
The connection properties when the auth type is ApiKey.
The type of the connection category.
The type of the connection properties.
Required. Key-value pairs for the custom keys.
Required. The custom keys for the connection.
The type fot the custom keys.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
Required. The credentials for the connection.
The connection properties when the auth type are CustomKeys.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
Required. The credentials for the connection.
The connection properties when the auth type is ManagedIdentity.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
The connection properties when the auth type is None.
Required. The authentication type of the connection target.
Required. The credentials for the connection.
The connection properties when the auth type is OAuth2.

The connection properties when the auth type is ServicePrincipal.

The connection properties when the auth type is UsernamePassword.
Required. The connection access key ID.
Required. The connection secret access key.
The type for the workspace connection access key.
Required. The connection key.
The type for the workspace connection account key.
Required. The connection API key.
The type for the workspace connection API key.
Required. The connection managed identity ID.
Required. The connection managed identity resource ID.
The type for the workspace connection managed identity.
Conditional. The connection auth URL. Required if connection category is Concur.
Required. The connection client ID in the format of UUID.
Required. The connection client secret.
Conditional. The connection developer token. Required if connection category is GoogleAdWords.
Conditional. The connection password. Required if connection category is Concur or ServiceNow where AccessToken grant type is 'Password'.
Conditional. The connection refresh token. Required if connection category is GoogleBigQuery, GoogleAdWords, Hubspot, QuickBooks, Square, Xero or Zoho.
Conditional. The connection tenant ID. Required if connection category is QuickBooks or Xero.
Conditional. The connection username. Required if connection category is Concur or ServiceNow where AccessToken grant type is 'Password'.
Required. The connection personal access token.
The type for the workspace connection personal access token.
Required. The connection client ID.
Required. The connection client secret.
Required. The connection tenant ID.
The type for the workspace connection service principal.
Required. The connection SAS token.
The type for the workspace connection shared access signature.
Required. The connection password.
Conditional. The connection security token. Required if connection is like SalesForce for extra security in addition to 'UsernamePassword'.
Required. The connection username.
The type for the workspace connection username and password.
Required. The name of the agent deployment.
Required. The type of deployment.
Optional. The display name of the deployment.
Optional. The description of the deployment.
Optional. The unique identifier of the deployment.

Required. Protocol types and versions exposed by this deployment.

Optional. The maximum number of replicas. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. Tags for the deployment.
The type for an agent deployment configuration.

The type for an agent protocol version.

Required. The agent's name (unique within the project/app).
Optional. The agent's version (unique for each agent lineage).
The type for a versioned agent reference.

The type for the traffic routing policy.

The type for an application configuration, used when defining applications for a project.
Required. Name of the connection to create.
Required. Category of the connection.
Optional. The expiry time of the connection.
Optional. Indicates whether the connection is shared to all users in the workspace.
Required. The metadata key-value pairs.
Optional. User metadata for the connection.
Optional. The shared user list of the connection.
Required. The target of the connection.
Optional. Value details of the workspace connection.
Required. The properties of the connection, specific to the auth type.
The type for the workspace connection.
Optional. The name of the diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Required. Name of a Diagnostic Metric category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `AllMetrics` to collect all metrics.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of metrics that will be streamed. "allMetrics" includes all possible metrics for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable metric collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if both logs & metrics are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. Enables system assigned managed identity on the resource.
Optional. The resource ID(s) to assign to the resource. Required if a user assigned identity is used for encryption.
An AVM-aligned type for a managed identity configuration. To be used if both a system-assigned & user-assigned identities are supported by the resource provider.
The name of the project capability host.
The resource ID of the project capability host.
The output type for a project-level capability host.
Required. Name of the capability host to create.
Optional. Array of AI services connection names. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for thread storage. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for vector stores. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for file storage. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
The type for a project-level capability host configuration.
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Required. The name of the parent Cognitive Services account.
Required. The name of the Foundry Project.
Required. The location for the Foundry Project.
Optional. The diagnostic settings of the service.
Optional. Resource tags for the Foundry Project.
Optional. The managed identity definition for this resource.
Optional. Role assignments to apply to the Foundry Project.
Required. Display name of the Foundry Project.
Optional. Description of the Foundry Project.
Optional. Connections to create in the Foundry Project.
Optional. Applications to create in the Foundry Project.
Optional. Capability hosts to create in the Foundry Project. These configure per-project storage backends for threads, vectors, and files.

variables.formattedUserAssignedIdentities: [reduce(map(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createArray()), lambda('id', createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))), createObject(), lambda('cur', 'next', union(lambdaVariables('cur'), lambdaVariables('next'))))]

project_connections.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('accountName'), parameters('name'), coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()].name)]
project_connections.properties: [union(coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()].connectionProperties, createObject('category', coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()].category, 'expiryTime', tryGet(coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'expiryTime'), 'isSharedToAll', tryGet(coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'isSharedToAll'), 'metadata', tryGet(coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'metadata'), 'sharedUserList', tryGet(coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'sharedUserList'), 'target', coalesce(parameters('connections'), createArray())[copyIndex()].target))]

parameters.aiServicesConnections: [if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'aiServicesConnectionNames'), null())), createObject('value', map(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()].aiServicesConnectionNames, lambda('connName', __bicep.buildConnectionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', parameters('accountName')), lambdaVariables('connName'))))), createObject('value', null()))]
parameters.threadStorageConnections: [if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'threadStorageConnectionNames'), null())), createObject('value', map(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()].threadStorageConnectionNames, lambda('connName', __bicep.buildConnectionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', parameters('accountName')), lambdaVariables('connName'))))), createObject('value', null()))]
parameters.vectorStoreConnections: [if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'vectorStoreConnectionNames'), null())), createObject('value', map(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()].vectorStoreConnectionNames, lambda('connName', __bicep.buildConnectionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', parameters('accountName')), lambdaVariables('connName'))))), createObject('value', null()))]
parameters.storageConnections: [if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'storageConnectionNames'), null())), createObject('value', map(coalesce(parameters('capabilityHosts'), createArray())[copyIndex()].storageConnectionNames, lambda('connName', __bicep.buildConnectionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', parameters('accountName')), lambdaVariables('connName'))))), createObject('value', null()))]

metadata.name: Cognitive Services Project Capability Host
metadata.description:
This module creates a capability host in a Cognitive Services project.
Project-level capability hosts configure per-project storage backends for threads, vectors, and files,
allowing different projects to use different storage connections.
See: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects/capabilityhosts
Required. Name of the capability host to create.
Optional. Array of AI services connection names. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for thread storage. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for vector stores. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for file storage. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
The type for a project-level capability host configuration.
The name of the project capability host.
The resource ID of the project capability host.
The output type for a project-level capability host.
Required. Name of the capability host to create.
Required. The name of the parent Cognitive Services account.
Required. The name of the parent Foundry Project.
Optional. Array of AI services connection resource IDs. These connections reference AI services available to the project.
Optional. Array of connection resource IDs for thread storage. These connections store conversation thread data for agents.
Optional. Array of connection resource IDs for vector stores. These connections store vector embeddings for semantic search.
Optional. Array of connection resource IDs for file storage. These connections store files uploaded to agents.
The resource ID of the project capability host.
The name of the project capability host.
The name of the resource group the project capability host was created in.

metadata.name: Cognitive Services Application
metadata.description:
This module creates an application within a Cognitive Services project.
Applications are agentic application instances that can contain agent deployments.
See: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects/applications
Optional. The agent's unique identifier within the organization (subscription).
Required. The agent's name (unique within the project/app). The agent must already exist in the project.
The type for a reference to an agent within an application.
Required. The authorization scheme type.
The type for the authorization policy of an application.
Required. The client ID of the identity.
Required. Specifies the kind of Entra identity.
Required. The principal ID of the identity.
Optional. The subject of this identity assignment.
Required. The tenant ID of the identity.
Required. The identity type from a management perspective.
The type for an assigned identity.
Optional. Methodology used to route traffic to deployments.
Optional. Collection of traffic routing rules.
The type for the traffic routing policy.
Optional. The unique identifier of the deployment to route traffic to.
Optional. A description for this traffic routing rule.
Optional. The identifier of this traffic routing rule.
Optional. The percentage of traffic allocated to this instance.
The type for a traffic routing rule.
Required. The name of the application.
Optional. The display name of the application.
Optional. A description of the application.
Optional. The authorization policy for the application.
Optional. The Entra ID agentic blueprint of the application.
Optional. The default agent instance identity.
Optional. The application's dedicated invocation endpoint.
Optional. The traffic routing policy for the application's deployments.
Required. The list of agent references in this application. Must contain at least one agent reference with agentName. Agents must exist in the project before the application can be deployed.
Optional. Tags for the application properties.
Optional. Agent deployments to create within this application.
The type for an application configuration, used when defining applications for a project.
The name of the application.
The resource ID of the application.
The type for the application output.
Required. The protocol used by the agent.
Optional. The version of the protocol.
The type for an agent protocol version.
Optional. The agent's unique identifier within the organization (subscription).
Required. The agent's name (unique within the project/app).
Optional. The agent's version (unique for each agent lineage).
The type for a versioned agent reference.
Required. The name of the agent deployment.
Required. The type of deployment.
Optional. The display name of the deployment.
Optional. The description of the deployment.
Optional. The unique identifier of the deployment.
Required. List of agent:version pairs deployed in this deployment.
Required. Protocol types and versions exposed by this deployment.
Optional. The minimum number of replicas. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. The maximum number of replicas. Only applicable when deploymentType is "Hosted".
Optional. Tags for the deployment.
The type for an agent deployment configuration.
Required. The name of the parent Cognitive Services account.
Required. The name of the parent project.
Required. The name of the application.
Optional. The display name of the application.
Optional. A description of the application.
Optional. The authorization policy for the application.
Optional. The Entra ID agentic blueprint of the application.
Optional. The default agent instance identity of the application.
Optional. The application's dedicated invocation endpoint.
Optional. The traffic routing policy for the application's deployments.

Required. The list of agent references in this application. Must contain at least one agent. Agents must exist in the project before the application can be created (created via data-plane APIs or az cognitiveservices agent create).
Optional. Tags for the application properties.
Optional. Agent deployments to create within this application.

application.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('accountName'), parameters('projectName'), parameters('name'))]
application.properties: [union(createObject('displayName', parameters('displayName'), 'description', parameters('description'), 'authorizationPolicy', parameters('authorizationPolicy'), 'agents', parameters('agents')), if(not(equals(parameters('agentIdentityBlueprint'), null())), createObject('agentIdentityBlueprint', parameters('agentIdentityBlueprint')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('defaultInstanceIdentity'), null())), createObject('defaultInstanceIdentity', parameters('defaultInstanceIdentity')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('baseUrl'), null())), createObject('baseUrl', parameters('baseUrl')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('trafficRoutingPolicy'), null())), createObject('trafficRoutingPolicy', parameters('trafficRoutingPolicy')), createObject()), if(not(equals(parameters('tags'), null())), createObject('tags', parameters('tags')), createObject()))]

application_agentDeployments.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}/{3}', parameters('accountName'), parameters('projectName'), parameters('name'), coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].name)]
application_agentDeployments.properties: [union(createObject('deploymentType', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].deploymentType, 'agents', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].agents, 'protocols', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].protocols), if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'displayName'), null())), createObject('displayName', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].displayName), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'description'), null())), createObject('description', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].description), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'deploymentId'), null())), createObject('deploymentId', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].deploymentId), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'tags'), null())), createObject('tags', coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].tags), createObject()), if(equals(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()].deploymentType, 'Hosted'), createObject('minReplicas', tryGet(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'minReplicas'), 'maxReplicas', tryGet(coalesce(parameters('agentDeployments'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'maxReplicas')), createObject()))]
